meta.title: Youth Hill – Plovdiv, Bulgaria
meta.description: Complete travel guide to Youth Hill in Plovdiv. Learn about this park, including location, amenities, and visitor information.

intro.title: Discover Youth Hill
intro.description: Youth Hill is a magnificent historical landmark located in Plovdiv, Plovdiv Province. The fortress offers breathtaking views and a deep dive into Bulgaria's medieval history. It is a favorite place for exploration, photography, and relaxation for visitors.

visitGuide.title: Visit Tips
items: The fortress is open year-round and free to access.
Best time to visit is early morning or evening.
There are benches and resting areas.
Suitable for walks with children and pets.

sections.title: History & Name
sections.content: The fortress has a rich history dating back to the Byzantine and medieval Bulgarian periods. It served as an important defensive stronghold and played a key role in the region's history.

sections.title: Location & Access
sections.content: Located in Plovdiv, Plovdiv Province, the fortress is situated on a striking plateau. It is accessible by car and public transport, offering an unforgettable historical journey.

sections.title: Amenities & Infrastructure
sections.content: The site features well-preserved ruins, a spectacular bridge, and walking paths. It is a popular destination for history enthusiasts and nature lovers.

sections.title: Management & Maintenance
sections.content: The fortress is maintained as an important cultural heritage site. The area is cared for to ensure preservation of history and safety for visitors.

items.question: When is Youth Hill open?
items.answer: The fortress is open year-round and accessible to visitors throughout the day. There are no specific operating hours restrictions.

items.question: Is there an entrance fee?
items.answer: No, access to the fortress is completely free for all visitors.

items.question: Are there children's playgrounds?
items.answer: Yes, there are children's playgrounds in the fortress where kids can play outdoors.

items.question: Is the fortress accessible for wheelchair users?
items.answer: The fortress has alleys that are suitable for wheelchair users, but some areas may be challenging. Please plan your visit in advance.

basicInfo.title: Basic Information
basicInfo.addressValue: Halm Na MladosttaCentral district, 4002 Plovdiv, Bulgaria

hours.title: Visiting Hours
hours.bestTimeSummer: Summer: Early morning or evening recommended
hours.bestTimeAutumn: Autumn: Mild temperatures, ideal for walks
hours.tip: Allow 1-2 hours for a full visit. Bring water and sun protection in summer.

tickets.title: Admission Information
tickets.parkingPrice: Street parking available in the area

transport.title: How to Get Here
transport.fromCenterDesc: From Plovdiv, take the A2 highway west towards Shumen. Take the Plovdiv exit and follow route 208 directly into the town center. The drive takes about 40-50 minutes.
transport.fromStationDesc: From Plovdiv railway/bus station, the fortress is about a 20-30 minute walk or a 5-minute taxi ride to the main trailheads.
transport.fromAirportDesc: From Plovdiv Airport, take the A2 highway west. The drive to Plovdiv takes approximately 40 minutes.
transport.publicTransportDesc: Regular trains (BDZ) and buses run daily from Plovdiv to Plovdiv. Upon arriving in Plovdiv, you can hike up or take a taxi to the northern parking area.
transport.walkingDesc: To reach the fortress on foot, head to the eastern stairs starting from 'Youth Hill' street in Plovdiv, or take the western eco-trail.
transport.drivingDesc: For the easiest access, drive to the Northern Entrance where a dedicated parking lot is available. Follow the signs for 'Крепост Овеч' from the town center.

route.title: Recommended Route
route.overview: Explore the fortress and its surroundings.

officialManagement.title: About Youth Hill
officialManagement.text: Youth Hill is maintained by the local authorities and cultural heritage organizations. It is an important part of Bulgaria's historical landmarks.
